title: US Treasury Yields Rise to 2026 Highs With Oil Sparking Fed Bets
title_cn: 油价引发美联储押注，美国国债收益率升至 2026 年高位

summary: While the yen’s plunge to a four-decade low against the dollar has dominated headlines, a broader gauge of the Japanese currency’s health is also flashing a warning.

title: Tech Bonds Hit by Selloff as AI Debt Fears Race Through Markets

summary: Amazon.com Inc. is being investigated by the Senate Small Business Committee for allegedly letting China influence the company’s online marketplace, according to a document reviewed by Bloomberg and two people interviewed as part of the investigation.

title_cn: SpaceX 再次推迟首次公开募股后的重大飞行测试

summary: GPS spoofing and other countermeasures meant to knock drones from the skies over battlefields are giving rise to novel navigation systems that will work even in the face of intense jamming.

title: Khosla Ventures in Talks to Raise $5.5 Billion in New Funds
title_cn: Khosla Ventures 正在洽谈筹集 55 亿美元新资金
summary: Early OpenAI backer Khosla Ventures is discussing raising as much as $5.5 billion for its latest set of venture investment funds, a haul that would amount to its largest fundraising event in its two-decade history, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Microsoft Replacing OpenAI Image AI Models in Powerpoint, Bing
title_cn: 微软替换 Powerpoint、Bing 中的 OpenAI 图像 AI 模型
summary: Microsoft Corp. is replacing OpenAI’s image-generating models with its own technology in popular products like PowerPoint and Bing.

title: IBM Cuts Full-Year Sales Outlook as Mainframe Demand Drops
title_cn: 由于大型机需求下降，IBM 下调全年销售预期
summary: International Business Machines Corp. cut its full-year sales outlook, including for its closely watched software unit, after reporting a dip in demand for its mainframe business.

title: Absa Nears Tanzania Deal to Combine $3 Billion of Assets
title_cn: Absa 接近坦桑尼亚合并 30 亿美元资产的交易
summary: Absa Group Ltd. is nearing a deal to combine its banking interests in Tanzania as the lender looks to increase the scale of its East African businesses, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Bolsonaro Pleads to End Family Feud as Campaign Falters
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗恳求结束家庭不和，因为竞选活动陷入困境
summary: The right-wing presidential campaign of Flávio Bolsonaro swung into desperation mode on Thursday, as the Brazilian fought allegations of ties to a bank scandal, beseeched his stepmother for support and faced a new police probe.

title: Trump Says US to Use Iranian Funds to Pay for Damage to Ships
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国将使用伊朗资金来赔偿船只损坏
summary: President Donald Trump said damage to ships and cargo would be paid for by Iranian funds frozen by the US after new strikes by Houthi rebels further strained global energy flows.

title: Trump Threatens More Attacks on Iran After Houthis Join War
title_cn: 胡塞武装参战后特朗普威胁对伊朗发动更多袭击
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to step up strikes on Iran and said he’d hold the country responsible for any further attacks by the Yemen-based Houthis on Red Sea ships, as the widening Middle East war puts new strain on global energy supplies.

title: US Sees Haiti in Turmoil Ahead of Potential Deportations of TPS Holders
title_cn: 美国认为海地在可能被驱逐出境之前陷入混乱
summary: Haiti remains mired in a lawless miasma even as the US is threatening to force hundreds of thousands of people who fled the Caribbean nation back home, after the Supreme Court ruled that President Donald Trump can terminate their special immigration status.

title: Burnham Tightens No. 10 Control on UK Economy in Power Shift
title_cn: 伯纳姆在权力转移中加强对英国经济的第十号控制
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham’s push to take economic decision-making out of Westminster is already running up against a limit: 10 Downing Street itself.

title: Burnham Signals Devolution Intent With Northern Number 10 Office
title_cn: 伯纳姆向北方 10 号办公室发出权力下放的信号
summary: Prime Minister Andy Burnham will open a new branch of 10 Downing Street in north-west England on Friday in an attempt to demonstrate his vision for devolving power away from London.

title: Trump Rebuilds Tariffs With Forced-Labor Duties on 60 Economies
title_cn: 特朗普对 60 个经济体重新征收关税并征收强迫劳动税
summary: The US will collect duties of between 10% and 12.5% on imports from most major trading partners, its biggest move yet to reconstruct President Donald Trump’s tariff wall that was pierced by the Supreme Court.

title: DOJ Drops NYT Reporter Subpoenas Over Air Force One Stories
title_cn: 司法部撤销《纽约时报》记者因空军一号报道而发出的传票
summary: The Department of Justice dropped subpoenas to New York Times reporters over stories detailing security concerns with President Donald Trump’s Qatari-donated Air Force One under pressure from a federal judge.

title: US Sanctions Mexican Cartel Leader in Sweeping Drug Crackdown
title_cn: 美国制裁墨西哥贩毒集团领导人
summary: The US Treasury Department announced sanctions against more than 50 people and businesses linked to the Jalisco Cartel, which has been accused of trafficking fentanyl and other illegal drugs into the country from Mexico.

title: Hidden Cost of Trump's USAID Cuts: Floods, Disease and Poverty
title_cn: 特朗普美国国际开发署削减开支的隐性成本：洪水、疾病和贫困
summary: The abrupt termination of an irrigation project in Kenya led to a once in a decade flood with devastating consequences.

title: US Sanctions Guernsey-Based Firm on Cuba Real Estate Investments

summary: The US government added CEIBA Investments Ltd, a Guernsey-based firm that has been investing in Cuban commercial real estate since 1996, to its growing list of sanctioned entities as it ramps up its pressure on the communist-led island.

title: Republicans Sit on $1 Billion War Chest Ahead of Midterms
title_cn: 共和党在中期选举前坐拥 10 亿美元的战争基金
summary: Donald Trump’s super PAC has spent just 0.6% of its cash to help candidates.

summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Canada is weighing all options for possible retaliation if it doesn’t reach a deal with the US to avert 50% tariffs next month.

title: South African Deputy Minister Quits as $220 Billion Fund’s Chair
title_cn: 南非副部长辞去2200亿美元基金主席职务
summary: South Africa’s deputy finance minister quit as the chairman of a state-owned firm that oversees $220 billion of government pensions, days before he faced being removed from the post.

title: Italy Targets Youth Crime Under Meloni’s Law-and-Order Push
title_cn: 意大利在梅洛尼的法律和秩序推动下打击青少年犯罪
summary: The Italian government introduced measures it says are devised to combat youth crime, as it continues to sharpen its law-and-order agenda ahead of a general election next year.

title: Germany’s Merz Taps Warken for His Chief of Staff in Reshuffle
title_cn: 德国默茨任命沃肯为幕僚长进行改组
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz will appoint Health Minister Nina Warken as his new chief of staff, according to multiple local media reports, making the 47-year-old conservative the first woman to hold the post in postwar Germany.

title: US Says EU’s Google Fine, Airbus Loan Undermine Trade Stability
title_cn: 美国称欧盟谷歌罚款、空客贷款破坏贸易稳定
summary: The Trump administration vented more trade frustration with the European Union, saying its targeting of US technology companies for fines and a recent loan to Airbus SE threaten to undermine constructive negotiations.

title: US House Rebukes Trump on Iran, Votes Again to End War
title_cn: 美国众议院就伊朗问题斥责特朗普，再次投票结束战争
summary: The US House called on President Donald Trump to halt the war on Iran for the second time as a handful of Republicans crossed their own leadership to support the measure.

title: Ukraine’s Fedorov Snubs Zelenskyy Job Offers, Seeking Comeback
title_cn: 乌克兰的费多罗夫拒绝了泽伦斯基的工作邀请，寻求东山再起
summary: Ukraine’s popular former Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov rejected all jobs offered to him by President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, saying he would only accept reinstatement to his old position, a move that could breathe new fire into nationwide protests backing him.

title: US to Outline Plans Thursday for Expiring Tariffs, Leavitt Says
title_cn: 莱维特表示，美国将于周四概述关税到期的计划
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer will make an announcement later Thursday about the administration’s tariff plans, the White House said, as a global 10% baseline levy is set to expire.
